## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what's changing and why. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Tick exactly one. The chosen branch prefix should match. -->

- [ ] `feat:` — new component, token, or variant (minor bump)
- [ ] `fix:` — bug fix or visual correction (patch bump)
- [ ] `chore:` — build, CI, deps, internal cleanup (no version impact)
- [ ] `docs:` — README / CHANGELOG / JSDoc only
- [ ] `style:` — token / padding / color nudge (patch bump)
- [ ] `breaking:` — removed/renamed exports, breaking visual change (major bump)

## Checklist

- [ ] I read `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` has an entry under `## [Unreleased]`.
- [ ] Tokens were used (no raw hex / px values in components or styles).
- [ ] If this is a new component or variant: type defs, preview card, and `src/components/index.js` re-export are all in place.
- [ ] If a public API or visual rule changed, the README / design rules are updated.
- [ ] CI is green.

## Screenshots / before–after

<!-- For any visual change. Drop screenshots from preview/ or the portal UI kit. -->

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything reviewers should look at especially carefully, or open questions. -->
